title: Warhammer 40,000: Darktide

notes:
I've tried forcing various compatibility layers (9.0-4 I think was the most stable originally, game used to run stable at first on this and I think it broke when I tried to increase performance by tinkering), updating my Nvidia drivers, installing Cachy's gaming package, verifying files and reinstalling, and trying various launch options, all without any success. I've also tried to tinker with the in-game settings when possible like turning off framerate generation, DLLS, etc, all without success.

It's possible I could get the game to work with more tinkering, which I'd like to do, but it might outside of my expertise at this time as I'm new to Cachy and Linux. I've had little problem running most other games (BG3, Civ6, etc), though they've been more native and compatible than Darktide I think.
